5 RULES TO REMEMBER IN LIFE:

gionn: Money cannot buy happiness but it’s more comfortable to cry in a Mercedes than on a bicycle. Forgive your enemy but remember the bastard’s name. Help someone when they are in trouble and they will remember you when they’re in trouble again. Many people are alive only because it’s...

How to build Android adb on ARM

Thanks to Google I’ve just found searching in many Forum threads the way to build adb on ARM arch.Just download sources with git (apt-get install git-core on debian-like system):$ git clone git://android.git.kernel.org/platform/system/core.git system/core$ git clone git://android.git.kernel.org/platform/build.git build$ git clone git://android.git.kernel.org/platform/external/zlib.git external/zlib$ git clone git://android.git.kernel.org/platform/bionic.git bionic Now edit build/core/main.mk and comment...

[Wi-Fi_UniNa & Android] 4 Dummies [UPDATED_2]

Scrivo questo post visti i tanti problemi legati all'uso della connessione wireless dell'Università Federico II di Napoli con il sistema per dispositivi mobili: Android. Ecco il procedimento necessario per il corretto collegamento alla rete wireless Wi-Fi_Unina*: Scaricare il certificato** necessario al collegamento da qui: http://www.alexworld.it/files/CybertrustEducationalCA.crt Visitare la pagina http://www.realmb.com/droidCert/ Effettuare...
